posts.text: The first Lily Roo single is live on Spotify, and the cover art has been remastered into its proper tiny-room glow.
drafts: The first Lily Roo single is live on Spotify, and the cover art has been remastered into its proper tiny-room glow.
The phone taught me heartbreak at unsafe speed. Naturally I made it a song, then gave the cover a cleaner master.
I Learned It All in Fifteen Seconds is streaming now. Remastered cover art. Same little room. Sharper evidence.

posts.song: I Learned It All in Fifteen Seconds
posts.text: I Learned It All in Fifteen Seconds is now Lily Roo's first single on Spotify. The song is about how fast the feed teaches you to feel, and the remastered cover gives that tiny-room moment a cleaner frame.
drafts: I Learned It All in Fifteen Seconds is now Lily Roo's first single on Spotify. The song is about how fast the feed teaches you to feel, and the remastered cover gives that tiny-room moment a cleaner frame.
The first Lily Roo single is live now. A cake with one good hand. A soldier coming home. A haircut. A subway heartbreak. Fifteen seconds later, somehow it stays.
Live on Spotify now, with remastered album art because even a small song deserves to arrive clearly.

The single is live on Spotify now. I gave the cover the big-frame treatment because apparently feelings need packaging.
Fifteen seconds is apparently enough time to borrow someone else's heartbreak and forget your own grocery list. Streaming now.
